physical_therapy.prior_function: Ambulated independently without assistive device; mild bradykinesia due to Parkinson disease
physical_therapy.current_mobility: Ambulated 60 feet with front-wheeled walker and minimal assist; requires verbal cues for safety
physical_therapy.weight_bearing: Weight bearing as tolerated left lower extremity
physical_therapy.recommendation: Patient is a good candidate for inpatient rehabilitation facility due to Parkinson disease and need for intensive PT/OT to regain baseline function. Recommend Springfield Rehabilitation Institute.
goals: Ambulate 150 feet with walker and supervision
Manage stairs with railing and supervision

occupational_therapy.adl_status: Requires minimal assist for bathing and dressing due to balance and bradykinesia
occupational_therapy.home_safety: Lives with spouse in single-story home; recommend removing throw rugs and installing grab bars in bathroom
